description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_NAME variable pointing to registry.gitlab.com/deepset-ai/open-source/fasttext-embeddings-de. Add a before_script that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. Define a single stage called build and a job named "build docker" in that stage that only runs on the master branch, executing the commands docker build -t $IMAGE_NAME . and docker push $IMAGE_NAME. No caches, artifacts, or further deployment targets are configured.
